Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce DuckDB SQL query that returns all events from event_log except those belonging to cases that have the sequence Approve Purchase Requisition then Create Order then Confirm Order with no intervening events in same case and where time between Create Order and Confirm Order more than 5 days

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So we need to identify those case IDs then filter them out

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can use window functions to detect sequences

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For each case order by timestamp Use LAG or LEAD to check patterns For direct succession we need three consecutive rows with those activities

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: We can compute row number per case ordered by timestamp Then self join where rn plus 1 and rn plus 2 correspond to next two rows Or use lead or lag

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Compute for each row activity lead1 equals lead activity over partition by case id order by timestamp lead2 equals lead activity 2 over same Then case where activity equals Approve Purchase Requisition and lead1 equals Create Order and lead2 equals Confirm Order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Also need time difference between lead1 timestamp and lead2 timestamp more than interval 5 days We need timestamps we can also lead timestamp

Name: Validation - PE
Text: But need to ensure no other events in between using lead ensures they are immediate next rows so no other events between

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now final query select all from event log where case id not in select case id from sequenced where the activities match and the time condition holds

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Make sure to alias columns Also need to handle null leads for last rows they will be null condition fails Return all columns

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Could order by case id timestamp
